# Enigm Documentation

> Public technical documentation for Enigm privacy-first communications, product architecture, security governance, legal trust boundaries, and operational resilience.

## Site

- Documentation: https://docs.enigm.io
- Website: https://enigm.io
- Enigm Command: https://app.enigm.io

## Enigm Docs

### Start

- [Welcome to Enigm documentation](https://docs.enigm.io/introduction): Executive technical introduction to Enigm product documentation.
- [Product Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/platform/architecture): High-level product architecture and shared vocabulary.

### Products

#### Enigm

- [App Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/app/overview): Enigm private messaging product overview.
- [App Account Model](https://docs.enigm.io/app/account-model): Identity, account, recovery, and device association model.
- [App Key Management](https://docs.enigm.io/app/key-management): Device-generated keys, protected storage, lifecycle, revocation, and recovery boundaries.
- [App Secure Messaging](https://docs.enigm.io/app/secure-messaging): End-to-end encrypted messaging and protected content lifecycle.
- [App Secure Calls](https://docs.enigm.io/app/secure-calls): Secure voice and video communication model.
- [App Active Defense](https://docs.enigm.io/app/active-defense): AI-assisted mobile spyware and network-behavior analysis.
- [App Multi-Device](https://docs.enigm.io/app/multi-device): Multi-device trust, enrollment, replacement, and revocation.
- [App Network Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/app/network-privacy): VPN Service, Proxy Network, randomized network activity, traffic separation, and metadata-reduction controls.

#### Enigm Command

- [Command Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/command/overview): Web control panel for account, device, product, and administrative lifecycle management.
- [Command Payment Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/command/payments): Payment privacy, reduced identity linkage, and commercial boundaries.
- [Command Tor Gateway](https://docs.enigm.io/command/tor-gateway): Onion access model for selected public web surfaces.

#### Enigm Server

- [Server Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/server/overview): Dedicated private server environment, membership controls, and encrypted content lifecycle boundaries.

#### Enigm OS

- [OS Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/os/overview): Enigm OS role in the broader ecosystem.
- [OS Security Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/os/security-architecture): Device Trust, hardening, and security architecture.
- [Trust Security Center](https://docs.enigm.io/os/trust-security-center): Local device trust evaluation states and findings model.
- [OS Network Policy](https://docs.enigm.io/os/network-policy): Secure networking, DNS policy, transport protection, and metadata reduction.
- [OS Device Experience and Management](https://docs.enigm.io/os/device-experience-management): Setup Wizard, Launcher, Privacy Mode, and Controlled Device Management.
- [OTA Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/os/ota-architecture): OTA release lifecycle, eligibility, and client verification.
- [OTA Security](https://docs.enigm.io/os/ota-security): OTA layered security, signing, Remote Attestation, and trust boundaries.
- [OS Production Gates](https://docs.enigm.io/os/production-gates): Production posture validation categories and evidence model.

#### Enigm Key and Enigm eSIM

- [Key Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/key/overview): Emergency hardware workflow and event-bound location sharing.
- [eSIM Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/esim/overview): Data-only private connectivity, third-party carrier boundaries, and compliance responsibilities.

### FAQ and Support

- [Get Help](https://docs.enigm.io/support/get-help): Support entry points and contact options.
- [FAQ](https://docs.enigm.io/support/faq): Common questions about Enigm products, privacy, security, trust, and support boundaries.

## Spanish Documentation

English remains the primary documentation language. Spanish documentation is available as a translated secondary locale.

### Primeros pasos

- [Introduccion](https://docs.enigm.io/es/introduction): Introduccion tecnica publica al ecosistema Enigm.
- [Arquitectura de producto](https://docs.enigm.io/es/platform/architecture): Arquitectura de producto y limites de confianza.

### Productos

- [Enigm Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/overview): Vision de Enigm como producto de mensajeria privada.
- [Account Model](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/account-model): Identidad, cuenta, recuperacion y dispositivos.
- [Key Management](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/key-management): Generacion, proteccion y ciclo de vida de claves.
- [Secure Messaging](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/secure-messaging): Mensajeria cifrada de extremo a extremo.
- [Secure Calls](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/secure-calls): Voz y video seguros.
- [Active Defense](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/active-defense): Analisis de riesgo de spyware y malware movil.
- [Multi-Device](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/multi-device): Confianza multi-dispositivo.
- [Network Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/es/app/network-privacy): VPN Service, Proxy Network y actividad aleatoria.
- [Command Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/command/overview): Panel web de control.
- [Payment Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/es/command/payments): Privacidad de pagos.
- [Tor Gateway](https://docs.enigm.io/es/command/tor-gateway): Acceso onion para superficies publicas.
- [Server Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/server/overview): Entorno dedicado y limites administrativos.
- [OS Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/overview): Plataforma de dispositivo seguro.
- [OS Security Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/security-architecture): Device Trust y hardening.
- [Trust Security Center](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/trust-security-center): Evaluacion local de confianza.
- [OS Network Policy](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/network-policy): Politica de red segura.
- [OS Device Experience](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/device-experience-management): Setup, Launcher, Privacy Mode y gestion.
- [OTA Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/ota-architecture): Ciclo de release y verificacion cliente.
- [OTA Security](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/ota-security): Seguridad OTA, signing y Remote Attestation.
- [Production Gates](https://docs.enigm.io/es/os/production-gates): Validacion de postura de produccion.
- [Key Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/key/overview): Llavero fisico de emergencia.
- [eSIM Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/esim/overview): Conectividad privada de solo datos.

### Seguridad y confianza

- [Security Model](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/security-model): Modelo de seguridad y defensa en profundidad.
- [Threat Model](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/threat-model): Amenazas y limites de confianza.
- [Cryptography](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/cryptography): Arquitectura criptografica.
- [Security Governance](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/governance): Governance, ISO 27001 y validacion.
- [Transparency Report](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/transparency-report): Transparencia y solicitudes legales.
- [Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/es/security/privacy): Principios y modelo de privacidad.
- [Data Retention](https://docs.enigm.io/es/legal/data-retention): Retencion y minimizacion.
- [Platform Limitations](https://docs.enigm.io/es/legal/limitations): Limitaciones consolidadas.
- [Intelligence Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/es/intelligence/overview): Enigm Intelligence.
- [Detection And Response](https://docs.enigm.io/es/intelligence/detection-and-response): Deteccion, riesgo y respuesta.
- [Enyra](https://docs.enigm.io/es/intelligence/enyra): IA de seguridad y correlacion.
- [Infrastructure Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/es/infrastructure/architecture): Infraestructura de soporte.
- [Secure SDLC](https://docs.enigm.io/es/infrastructure/secure-sdlc): Ciclo de desarrollo seguro.
- [Operations And Resilience](https://docs.enigm.io/es/infrastructure/operations-resilience): Monitorizacion, incidentes y continuidad.
- [Legal Governance](https://docs.enigm.io/es/legal/legal-governance): Jurisdiccion y compliance.
- [Responsible Disclosure](https://docs.enigm.io/es/legal/responsible-disclosure): Divulgacion responsable.
- [Security Contact](https://docs.enigm.io/es/legal/security-contact): Contacto de seguridad.

### FAQ y soporte

- [Obtener ayuda](https://docs.enigm.io/es/support/get-help): Puntos de contacto y soporte.
- [FAQ](https://docs.enigm.io/es/support/faq): Preguntas frecuentes sobre Enigm.

## Security and Trust

### Security

- [Security Model](https://docs.enigm.io/security/security-model): Public security model for Enigm products and services.
- [Privacy](https://docs.enigm.io/security/privacy): Privacy principles, data minimization, identity minimization, metadata reduction, and privacy model.
- [Threat Model](https://docs.enigm.io/security/threat-model): Threat-model framework and trust boundaries.
- [Cryptography](https://docs.enigm.io/security/cryptography): Cryptographic architecture, post-quantum model, key lifecycle, OTA cryptography, and assessment model.
- [Security Governance](https://docs.enigm.io/security/governance): ISO 27001, compliance, assurance evidence, implementation status, transparency, and validation practices.
- [Transparency Report](https://docs.enigm.io/security/transparency-report): Public annual transparency reporting framework.

### Intelligence

- [Intelligence Overview](https://docs.enigm.io/intelligence/overview): Enigm Intelligence platform overview.
- [Detection and Response](https://docs.enigm.io/intelligence/detection-and-response): Detection, correlation, risk assessment, defensive response, and Enyra relationship.
- [Enyra Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/intelligence/enyra): Security AI, correlation, event summarization, risk explanation, and defensive decision support.

### Infrastructure

- [Infrastructure Architecture](https://docs.enigm.io/infrastructure/architecture): Supporting infrastructure architecture.
- [Secure SDLC](https://docs.enigm.io/infrastructure/secure-sdlc): Secure software development lifecycle and release security.
- [Operations and Resilience](https://docs.enigm.io/infrastructure/operations-resilience): Monitoring, incident response, backup, recovery, and business continuity.

### Legal and Privacy

- [Legal Governance](https://docs.enigm.io/legal/legal-governance): Jurisdiction, lawful request handling, third-party carrier boundaries, and continuity model.
- [Data Retention](https://docs.enigm.io/legal/data-retention): Data retention and data minimization model.
- [Platform Limitations](https://docs.enigm.io/legal/limitations): Consolidated limitations across products, security, operations, legal, and privacy.
- [Responsible Disclosure](https://docs.enigm.io/legal/responsible-disclosure): Responsible disclosure policy.
- [Security Contact](https://docs.enigm.io/legal/security-contact): Security communication channels.

## Public Boundaries

The documentation is vendor-neutral and avoids provider names, internal infrastructure names, internal endpoints, secrets, tokens, private routes, operational topology, and attack-surface details.
